---
title: "Class 08: Breast Cancer Mini Project"
author: "Erin McTavish PID: A17300519"
format: html
---

## Background

In today's class we will apply the methods and techniques clustering and PCA to help make sense of a real world breast cancer FNA (fine needle aspirations: digitized images of the cell focusing on the nucleus) biopsy. 


## Data Import

We start by importing our data. It is a CSV file so we will use the `read.csv()` function.

```{r}
read.csv(file="WisconsinCancer.csv")
read.table(file="WisconsinCancer.csv", sep=",")
```
